Title: Skyflow - Complete Payment Flow (Cart-Embedded, New Card)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item
- Skyflow payment processor configured with AllowCartPayment=true (vc-module-skyflow 3.1002.0+)
- NOTE: If user has saved Skyflow cards, a 'Select credit card' dropdown renders first. In that case, select 'Add new card' from the dropdown to reveal the new-card iframe fields.
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}, skyflow_card=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number), skyflow_exp=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.expiry), skyflow_cvv=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cvv)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] Wait for Skyflow payment section to render inline on the cart page (no redirect)
[ACT] Select 'Bank card (Skyflow)' payment method if not pre-selected
[ACT] If a 'Select credit card' dropdown is present (user has saved cards), select 'Add new card' from the dropdown
[WAIT] Wait for Skyflow iframe fields to render: 'Card number', 'Cardholder name', 'Expiration date' (MM / YY), 'Security code'
[ASSERT] All four Skyflow iframe fields are visible on the cart page
[ACT] Fill 'Card number' iframe field with '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number)'
[ACT] Fill 'Cardholder name' field with '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cardholder)'
[ACT] Fill 'Expiration date' iframe field with '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.expiry)' (MM / YY format)
[ACT] Fill 'Security code' iframe field with '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cvv)'
[ASSERT] 'Place order' button becomes enabled after all fields are valid
[ACT] Click 'Place order'
[WAIT] Wait for payment processing and order confirmation
Assertions:
[STATE] Skyflow payment form renders INLINE on /cart — NO redirect to /checkout/payment occurs before clicking 'Place order'
[NAV] After successful payment user is navigated to order confirmation page or /checkout/completed
[DOM] Order confirmation shows order number
[STATE] Card data tokenized by Skyflow — raw PAN not transmitted in any network request
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation errors[] is empty
[NETWORK] Raw Mastercard PAN '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number)' absent from all storefront network payloads (Skyflow tokenized)
[ADMIN] Order in admin with Skyflow payment method and tokenized card reference
[API] cart availablePaymentMethods includes SkyflowPaymentMethod with allowCartPayment=true
Failure_Signals: Skyflow form not rendered inline on /cart; clicking 'Place order' triggers redirect to /checkout/payment instead of submitting inline; payment tokenization fails; order confirmation not reached
References: config.js; Synced: VCST-5009 PR#2308+PR#23 (2026-06-04)

Title: Skyflow - Mastercard Payment (Cart-Embedded)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item
- Skyflow configured with AllowCartPayment=true
- Canonical Skyflow Mastercard test card available via SKYFLOW_MC alias (number/expiry/cvv fields)
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}, ADMIN_URL={{ADMIN_URL}}, ADMIN_EMAIL={{ADMIN_EMAIL}}, ADMIN_PASSWORD={{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}, skyflow_card=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number), skyflow_exp=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.expiry), skyflow_cvv=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cvv)

[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; select 'Bank card (Skyflow)' payment method

Title: Saved Card - Returning User Pays Without Re-entering Card Details
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as registered user who has previously completed a successful CyberSource or Skyflow payment
- A saved/tokenized card exists in the user's account (from prior payment — CyberSource or Skyflow both applicable; Skyflow saves cards per live-verified behavior 2026-06-04)
- Cart has at least one item
- CyberSource or Skyflow payment processor configured and active
Steps:
[NAV] Log in as {{USER_EMAIL}} / {{USER_PASSWORD}} — a user with a previously saved card (seed one via PAY-SKY-009 if the account has none — Skyflow saves the card after any successful cart payment)
[ACT] Add at least one item to cart
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] Wait for payment section to render
[ASSERT] Previously saved card is displayed in the payment section — e.g., 'Mastercard ending in XXXX' (Skyflow) or 'Visa ending in XXXX' (CyberSource), or equivalent masked card reference
[ACT] Select the saved card option (if not pre-selected)
[ASSERT] Card number, expiry, and CVV fields are NOT fully displayed or editable — only masked card info shown; CVV re-entry field may appear
[ACT] Enter CVV only if prompted
[ACT] Click 'Place order'
[WAIT] Wait for order processing response
[ASSERT] Order confirmation page displayed — payment succeeded using saved card
Assertions:
[DOM] Saved card displayed in payment section with masked card number (e.g., '•••• •••• •••• 0015' for Skyflow MC, '•••• •••• •••• 3705' for CS Visa)
[STATE] Full card number and expiry fields not re-shown or editable when saved card selected
[NAV] Order confirmation reached after clicking 'Place order' with saved card
[DOM] Order confirmation shows order number
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation response has no errors[] entries
[NETWORK] Network request uses stored token — raw card PAN absent from all payloads
[ADMIN] Order in admin shows payment method as stored card / tokenized reference
Failure_Signals: Saved card not shown after prior successful payment; user forced to re-enter full card details; raw card number visible in network payload; order fails with saved card; saved Skyflow card not presented inline on /cart; saved-card CVV re-entry creates a stray CVV-only vault record (POST) instead of updating the saved card record (PUT) — VCST-5009 / PR#2328 pre-fix symptom
Cleanup: Cancel order via admin if created
References: Checklist #9 item 12; ECL-14.6; BL-PAY-003; BL-PAY-001; Synced: VCST-5009 PR#2308+PR#23 (2026-06-04); PR#2328 (saved-card CVV re-entry binds skyflowID on the CVV element → PUT-updates existing record, not a stray POST), re-synced 2026-06-11

Title: Skyflow Tokenization - Raw Card PAN Absent from All Network Requests (Cart-Embedded)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item
- Skyflow payment processor configured with AllowCartPayment=true
- Browser DevTools Network tab open and recording ALL requests (including XHR/Fetch)
- Test card number known for verification: @td(SKYFLOW_MC.number) (canonical QA vault card — only card accepted by Skyflow QA vault)
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}, TEST_CARD_NUMBER=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number), TEST_CARD_EXP=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.expiry), TEST_CARD_CVV=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cvv)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; select 'Bank card (Skyflow)'; open DevTools Network tab and start recording
[WAIT] Wait for Skyflow iframe fields to render inline on /cart — no redirect required
[ACT] Fill Skyflow 'Card Number' iframe field with '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number)'; fill 'Expiry Date' with '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.expiry)'; fill 'CVV' with '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cvv)'
[ACT] Click 'Place Order' (inline cart-embedded submission — no navigation to /checkout/payment)
[WAIT] Wait for order processing to complete and order confirmation to load
[ACT] In DevTools Network tab: filter requests by XHR/Fetch; search all request payloads for the string '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number)'
[ASSERT] Raw card number '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number)' is NOT present in any request payload, URL parameter, or response body
[ACT] Locate the Skyflow tokenization request in Network tab; inspect the token value sent to the Virto Commerce backend
[ASSERT] Token format is a UUID or alphanumeric reference — NOT the raw card PAN
[ASSERT] Order confirmation page reached after successful Skyflow cart-embedded payment
Assertions:
[NETWORK] String '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number)' absent from all captured network request payloads and URLs
[NETWORK] Skyflow token (UUID or alphanumeric) present in the request sent to Virto Commerce backend instead of raw PAN
[NAV] Order confirmation reached via cart-embedded flow — tokenization did not block payment flow
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation errors[] is empty
[ADMIN] Order in admin shows Skyflow token or masked card reference — not raw PAN
Failure_Signals: Raw card number '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number)' found in any network request payload (BL-PAY-001 / BL-PAY-002 violation); Skyflow token not present in backend request; tokenization request fails; token format is full PAN rather than opaque reference
References: Checklist #9 item 10; ECL-9.1; BL-PAY-001; BL-PAY-002; Synced: VCST-5009 PR#2308+PR#23 (2026-06-04)

Title: Skyflow ↔ CyberSource Switch - onUnmounted Processor Cleanup (No Stale Processor)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as registered user
- Fresh cart with ≥1 item for each switch direction (IMPORTANT: start from fresh cart per direction — cart-resolver appends payment rows on switch; orphaned rows cause false state)
- CyberSource and Skyflow payment processors both enabled
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}, cs_card=@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.number), cs_exp=@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.expiry), cs_cvv=@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.cvv), sky_card=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number), sky_exp=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.expiry), sky_cvv=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cvv)
Steps:
--- Switch direction 1: Skyflow → CyberSource (fresh cart) ---
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart with fresh cart
[WAIT] Wait for payment methods section to render
[ACT] Select 'Bank card (Skyflow)' payment method
[WAIT] Wait for Skyflow iframe fields to render inline on cart page
[ASSERT] Skyflow iframe fields are visible
[ACT] Enter '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number)' in Skyflow card number field (partial entry to set form state)
[ACT] Switch to 'Bank card (CyberSource)' payment method
[WAIT] Wait for CyberSource Flex Microform to render
[ASSERT] CyberSource iframe fields are visible
[ASSERT] Skyflow iframe fields are no longer visible in the DOM
[ASSERT] 'Place order' button is DISABLED (Skyflow onUnmounted called setCardDataInvalid; CyberSource not yet filled)
[ACT] Fill CyberSource card with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.number)'; fill '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.expiry)'; fill '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.cvv)'
[ACT] Click 'Place order'
[WAIT] Wait for order confirmation
[ASSERT] Order confirmation reached — payment processed via CyberSource (confirms no stale Skyflow processor routed the payment)
--- Switch direction 2: CyberSource → Skyflow (fresh cart) ---
[PRE:RESET_CART]
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart with fresh cart
[ACT] Select 'Bank card (CyberSource)'; fill all CS fields with valid data
[ACT] Switch to 'Bank card (Skyflow)'
[WAIT] Wait for Skyflow inline form to render
[ASSERT] CyberSource form fields are no longer visible
[ASSERT] Skyflow iframe fields are visible
[ASSERT] 'Place order' button is DISABLED (CyberSource onUnmounted called setCardDataInvalid; Skyflow not yet filled)
Assertions:
[DOM] After Skyflow→CS switch: CyberSource form renders; Skyflow form absent from DOM
[STATE] After Skyflow→CS switch: 'Place order' button disabled until CS fields filled; Skyflow onUnmounted cleanup confirmed fired
[STATE] After Skyflow→CS switch: CyberSource order succeeds with no cross-processor routing error
[DOM] After CS→Skyflow switch: Skyflow form renders; CyberSource form absent
[STATE] After CS→Skyflow switch: 'Place order' button disabled; CyberSource onUnmounted cleanup confirmed fired
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] No JS errors during either switch — no 'processor already registered' or stale-processor errors
[NETWORK] No duplicate payment-initialization requests fired during method switch
Failure_Signals: Stale Skyflow processor routes CyberSource payment (cross-processor routing — onUnmounted unregister not called); 'Place order' button stays enabled after switch (setCardDataInvalid not called — regression); JS TypeError on switch; wrong form persists after switch
Cleanup: Cancel CyberSource order via admin if placed during direction-1
References: VCST-5009; PR#2308 (onUnmounted in payment-processing-skyflow.vue + payment-processing-cyber-source.vue); Synced: VCST-5009 (2026-06-04)

Title: Skyflow - Order-Context Payment via /account/orders Still Works (initializePayment Path)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
- An unpaid Skyflow order exists in the test account. vcst-qa has 18 orders in 'Payment required' status for the test user (verified 2026-06-04) — no seeding required in most runs. Fallback seed: complete a cart checkout with decline CVV 902 or 904 (which pre-creates an order and routes to /checkout/payment for retry), or create via Admin SPA.
- Skyflow payment processor configured
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}, sky_card=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.number), sky_exp=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.expiry), sky_cvv=@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cvv)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/orders
[WAIT] Wait for orders list to load
[ACT] Locate an unpaid Skyflow order (status 'Payment required' with pending Skyflow payment)
[ACT] Click on the order to open order detail

Title: Skyflow - Saved-Card Payment With CVV Re-entry Updates Existing Vault Record (No Stray CVV-Only Record)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as a registered user who already has at least one saved Skyflow card (Skyflow saves the card after any successful cart payment — live-verified 2026-06-04). If the account has none, seed one by running PAY-SKY-009 (one successful Skyflow cart payment) first, then start this case.
- Cart has at least one item
- Skyflow configured with AllowCartPayment=true (vc-module-skyflow 3.1003.0+)
- REGRESSION GUARD for VCST-5009 / vc-frontend PR#2328. Pre-fix, the CVV collect element had no skyflowID bound at creation, so collect() POSTed a new bare-CVV-only record to the vault instead of PUT-updating the saved card record — saved-card authorization then failed. The fix binds selectedSkyflowCard.skyflowId on the CVV element in initCvvForm and removes the post-collect cvvElement.update() workaround. PR#2328 ALSO calls registerPaymentProcessor(sendPaymentData) at the start of onMounted so Place-order routing no longer depends on Skyflow init completing first.
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; select a Delivery method (e.g. Fixed Rate Ground) so payment is the only remaining Place-order gate
[ACT] Select 'Bank card (Skyflow)' payment method if not pre-selected
[WAIT] Wait for the 'Select credit card' dropdown to render listing the user's saved Skyflow card(s) (masked, e.g. 'Mastercard ending in 0015')
[ACT] Select the saved CANONICAL Mastercard ending in 0015 (the SKYFLOW_MC card seeded by PAY-SKY-009) — do NOT choose 'Add new card'. NOTE: the Skyflow QA vault only authorizes this canonical card, so if the account also holds other saved cards (e.g. a Visa ending 1111) they will decline regardless of the fix — pick the MC
[ASSERT] Full card number / expiration fields are NOT shown — only the masked saved card plus a 'Security code' (CVV) re-entry field render
[ACT] Open DevTools Network tab and start recording (capture Skyflow vault + createOrderFromCart requests)
[ACT] Fill the 'Security code' (CVV) iframe field with '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cvv)' (CVV 900 — happy-path)
[WAIT] Wait for 'Place order' button to become enabled
[ACT] Click 'Place order'
[WAIT] Wait for payment processing and order confirmation
[ASSERT] Payment SUCCEEDS — user navigated to order confirmation / /checkout/completed with an order number
Assertions:
[STATE] Saved Skyflow card selectable from the dropdown with only a CVV re-entry field (no full card fields re-shown)
[NAV] Order confirmation reached after paying with the saved card + re-entered CVV — NO redirect to /checkout/payment for this cart-context saved-card flow
[DOM] Order number visible on confirmation
[STATE] Payment authorized using the saved card (not a freshly created card record)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] The Skyflow vault request fired by the CVV collect (HTTP POST {vaultUrl}/v1/vaults/{vaultId}) carries the saved card's skyflowID and UPDATES that record — its records[] body references the existing record id (records[].method=PUT/UPDATE with ID bound). PRE-FIX FAILURE shape: records[] is a bare {fields:{cvv}} insert with records[].method=POST and NO skyflowID, creating a stray CVV-only record (live-verified 2026-06-11: stray skyflow_id 33b12906-…). DISCRIMINATE on the record-level method + skyflowID inside the body, NOT the HTTP verb (the HTTP call is POST either way)
[API] createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation errors[] is empty
[NETWORK] Raw card PAN absent from all payloads — only the Skyflow token / saved-card skyflowID reference is transmitted
[ADMIN] Order in admin records the saved/tokenized card reference (no new card instrument created)
Failure_Signals: PRIMARY ORACLE: the CVV collect's Skyflow vault body is a bare {cvv} insert with no skyflowID (records[].method=POST) → stray CVV-only record created instead of a PUT update on the saved card; 'Place order' silently no-ops because no payment processor was registered on mount (registerPaymentProcessor not called); redirect to /checkout/payment for the cart-context saved-card flow; raw PAN visible in any network payload. NOTE: a decline alone is NOT a sufficient signal — decline code 65 also fires for a genuine CVV mismatch (see PAY-SKY-013/014); only the missing-skyflowID stray-record network evidence confirms THIS bug
References: VCST-5009; vc-frontend PR#2328 (skyflowID bound on CVV element in initCvvForm; registerPaymentProcessor moved to onMounted start); BL-PAY-003, BL-PAY-001; Synced: VCST-5009 PR#2328 (2026-06-11); reviewed against live repro 2026-06-11

Title: Skyflow - Saved-Card A↔B Switching Race: cvvInitToken Guard Mounts Exactly One CVV Collector and Authorizes the FINALLY-Selected Card
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as a registered user (USER_DEFAULT, owner of the saved Skyflow cards) who has AT LEAST TWO saved Skyflow cards: card A = the canonical Mastercard ending 0015 (SKYFLOW_MC, seeded by PAY-SKY-009) and card B = any other saved card (e.g. a Visa ending 1111 seeded by PAY-SKY-018). If the account has <2 saved cards, seed a 2nd via PAY-SKY-018 first.
- Cart has at least one item; a Delivery method selected so payment is the only remaining Place-order gate.
- Skyflow configured with AllowCartPayment=true (vc-module-skyflow 3.1003.0+).
- HIGHEST-PRIORITY REGRESSION GUARD for VCST-5009 / vc-frontend PR#2328 mechanic #2 (currently ZERO regression coverage). PR#2328 added a cvvInitToken guard inside initCvvForm: each saved-card selection starts a new init run with a fresh token; when the shopper switches cards while a prior initCvvForm() is still mid-flight, the superseded run aborts before mounting its CVV collector — so only ONE CVV collector iframe is ever mounted and the CVV element binds to the FINALLY-selected card's skyflowID (never a stale/wrong record). PR#2328 also calls registerPaymentProcessor(sendPaymentData) at onMounted start so Place-order routing no longer depends on Skyflow init finishing first.
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; select a Delivery method (e.g. Fixed Rate Ground) so payment is the only remaining Place-order gate
[ACT] Select 'Bank card (Skyflow)' payment method if not pre-selected
[WAIT] Wait for the 'Select credit card' dropdown to render listing the user's saved Skyflow cards (masked, e.g. 'Mastercard ending in 0015' and the 2nd card)
[ACT] Open DevTools and start recording console + DOM (we will count CVV collector iframes and watch for exceptions)
[ACT] RAPID SWITCH: from the dropdown select saved card A, then IMMEDIATELY (before the CVV form finishes initializing) select 'Add new card', then IMMEDIATELY select saved card B, then switch back to card A — perform 3-4 selections in quick succession while the inline payment area is still re-rendering the CVV form each time (this exercises overlapping initCvvForm runs)
[ACT] SETTLE on the CANONICAL Mastercard ending 0015 (card A) as the final selection — wait for the inline area to fully settle on that card (the Skyflow QA vault authorizes ONLY this canonical card; a non-canonical final selection would itself decline)
[ASSERT] After settling, EXACTLY ONE 'Security code' (CVV) collector iframe is mounted in the payment area — no duplicate/orphan CVV iframe left over from a superseded init run
[ACT] Fill the single 'Security code' (CVV) iframe field with '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cvv)' (CVV 900 — happy-path for the canonical card)
[WAIT] Wait for 'Place order' button to become enabled
[ACT] Click 'Place order' — single click only (BL-CHK-002)
[WAIT] Wait for payment processing and order confirmation
Assertions:
[STATE] Exactly ONE CVV collector iframe present after the rapid switching settles (no duplicate CVV collector — the cvvInitToken guard aborted the superseded initCvvForm runs)
[NAV] Payment SUCCEEDS — user navigated to order confirmation / /checkout/completed with an order number (the CVV bound to the FINALLY-selected canonical card, so authorization passes)
[DOM] Order confirmation shows an order number
[STATE] 'Place order' enabled after the single CVV is filled, and disabled immediately after the first click (BL-CHK-002) — Place-order routing worked despite the init churn (registerPaymentProcessor called at onMounted start)
[CONSOLE] No JS exception thrown during the rapid card switching or at Place-order (exclude the known-benign 'DOMWindow origin mismatch' Skyflow warnings)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation errors[] is empty
[ADMIN] AUTHORITATIVE ORACLE for WHICH card the order used — the masked PAN is NOT on the VC order; open the order's gateway transaction in Admin and read responseData ('Account number XXXX####'); it MUST reference the canonical Mastercard ending 0015 (the finally-selected card A), NOT card B
[NETWORK] Raw card PAN absent from all storefront payloads — only the Skyflow token / saved-card skyflowID reference is transmitted (BL-PAY-001)
Failure_Signals: More than one CVV collector iframe mounted after switching (cvvInitToken guard regression — duplicate collector); the order authorizes against card B or a stale record instead of the finally-selected card A (CVV bound to the wrong skyflowID — read the gateway txn responseData, not the VC order, to confirm); JS exception during rapid switching or at Place-order; 'Place order' silently no-ops (registerPaymentProcessor not registered on mount); redirect to /checkout/payment for this cart-context saved-card flow; raw PAN visible in any network payload
Cleanup: Cancel the created order via admin
References: VCST-5009; vc-frontend PR#2328 (cvvInitToken guard aborts superseded initCvvForm runs; registerPaymentProcessor moved to onMounted start); Skyflow module 3.1003.0; BL-PAY-003, BL-PAY-001, BL-CHK-002; live-verified facts 2026-06-12

- Logged in as USER_DEFAULT with at least one saved Skyflow card = the canonical Mastercard ending 0015 (SKYFLOW_MC, seeded by PAY-SKY-009/018).
- Cart has at least one item; a Delivery method selected so payment is the only remaining Place-order gate.
- Skyflow configured with AllowCartPayment=true (vc-module-skyflow 3.1003.0+).
- LIVE-VERIFIED decline trigger: the Skyflow QA vault APPROVES all PANs, so the only reliable decline is a CVV MISMATCH on the canonical card — CVV 904 (NOT a bad card number). This is the saved-card sibling of PAY-SKY-013/014 (which use a new-card form). REGRESSION GUARD: confirms the saved-card decline path surfaces a decline and a corrected-CVV retry on the SAME saved card succeeds, producing exactly one completed order.
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; select a Delivery method (e.g. Fixed Rate Ground) so payment is the only remaining Place-order gate
[ACT] Select 'Bank card (Skyflow)' payment method if not pre-selected
[WAIT] Wait for the 'Select credit card' dropdown listing the saved canonical Mastercard ending in 0015
[ACT] Select the saved CANONICAL Mastercard ending in 0015 (do NOT choose 'Add new card')
[ASSERT] Only the masked saved card + a 'Security code' (CVV) re-entry field render (full card fields not re-shown)
[ACT] Fill the 'Security code' (CVV) field with the MISMATCHED CVV '904' (decline trigger on the canonical card)
[WAIT] Wait for 'Place order' to become enabled
[ACT] Click 'Place order' — single click only (BL-CHK-002)
[WAIT] Wait for the processor decline to surface
[ASSERT] A payment DECLINE is surfaced to the shopper (decline message / failed-payment state; the decline may pre-create an order and route to /checkout/payment retry — live-verified decline behavior, see PAY-SKY-014)
[ACT] On the retry, re-select the saved canonical Mastercard ending in 0015 if needed and enter the CORRECT CVV '@td(SKYFLOW_MC.cvv)' (CVV 900)
[WAIT] Wait for 'Place order' to become enabled again
[ACT] Click 'Place order' — single click only
[WAIT] Wait for payment processing and order confirmation
Assertions:
[STATE] First attempt with the mismatched CVV 904 DECLINES — no successful authorization, decline surfaced to the shopper
[STATE] Retry with the corrected CVV 900 on the SAME saved card SUCCEEDS — order confirmation reached with an order number
[MATH] Exactly ONE completed/authorized order results from the decline→retry loop (the declined attempt does not leave a second paid order; BL-CHK-002 idempotency)
[DOM] Order confirmation shows an order number after the corrected-CVV retry
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart / authorizePayment: the first (CVV 904) attempt returns isSuccess=false / a decline; the retry (CVV 900) returns isSuccess=true with errors[] empty
[ADMIN] Admin shows the declined attempt as failed/declined and exactly one Authorized/Paid order from the retry — verify against the gateway transaction responseData (decline code 65 / CVV mismatch on the first txn)
[NETWORK] Raw card PAN absent from all payloads on both attempts (only the saved-card skyflowID / Skyflow token transmitted)
Failure_Signals: Mismatched CVV 904 unexpectedly AUTHORIZES (decline path broken — vault should reject CVV mismatch); corrected-CVV retry fails to complete on the same saved card; TWO paid orders result from the decline→retry loop (idempotency break, BL-CHK-002); raw PAN visible in any payload; the decline blocks ALL further retries on the saved card
Cleanup: Cancel the completed order via admin; cancel/void any declined pre-created order
References: VCST-5009; vc-frontend PR#2328; Skyflow module 3.1003.0; BL-CHK-004, BL-CHK-002, BL-PAY-003; live-verified decline trigger = CVV mismatch 904 (2026-06-12); sibling of PAY-SKY-013/014

Title: Skyflow - Multiple Saved Cards: Dropdown Lists All Masked, Selecting One Shows Only Its Masked Info + CVV Field
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as USER_DEFAULT with AT LEAST TWO saved Skyflow cards (the canonical Mastercard ending 0015 plus a 2nd card seeded via PAY-SKY-018). If <2 cards, seed via PAY-SKY-018 first.
- Cart has at least one item; a Delivery method selected.
- Skyflow configured with AllowCartPayment=true (vc-module-skyflow 3.1003.0+).
- Display/UX coverage for the saved-card list — does NOT place an order (no vault authorization needed). Verifies all saved cards are listed and masked, and selecting a specific card scopes the form to that card's masked info + CVV field only.
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; select a Delivery method (e.g. Fixed Rate Ground)
[ACT] Select 'Bank card (Skyflow)' payment method if not pre-selected
[WAIT] Wait for the 'Select credit card' dropdown to render
[ACT] Open the 'Select credit card' dropdown
[ASSERT] The dropdown lists ALL of the user's saved Skyflow cards (>=2 entries), plus an 'Add new card' option
[ASSERT] Each saved-card entry is MASKED — shows only brand + last 4 (e.g. 'Mastercard ending 0015'); no full 16-digit PAN, no CVV, no expiry beyond what the UI masks
[ACT] Select the canonical Mastercard ending in 0015
[ASSERT] After selecting that card, ONLY its masked info + a single 'Security code' (CVV) re-entry field render — the full 'Card number' / 'Cardholder name' / 'Expiration date' new-card fields are NOT shown
[ACT] Switch the dropdown to the OTHER saved card
[ASSERT] The form now reflects the other card's masked info + a single CVV field (the previously-selected card's details are not retained)
Assertions:
[DOM] Dropdown lists all (>=2) saved Skyflow cards, each masked to brand + last 4, plus 'Add new card'
[STATE] Selecting a specific saved card scopes the inline form to that card's masked info + one CVV field only (no full new-card fields)
[STATE] Switching to a different saved card updates the displayed masked info to the newly-selected card (exactly one masked card shown at a time)
[FORMAT] No raw PAN, CVV value, or unmasked card data is ever rendered in the dropdown or the selected-card view (BL-PAY-001)
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] skyflowCards(storeId:"{{STORE_ID}}") returns the same set of cards the dropdown lists, each with a masked cardNumber and a skyflowId, and NO raw PAN (introspection-confirmed query — see CVAL-GQL-012)
Failure_Signals: Dropdown shows fewer cards than the account holds, or omits a saved card; a card rendered with a full/unmasked PAN or visible CVV (BL-PAY-001 violation — file P0 bug); selecting a card re-shows the full new-card fields (Card number/Cardholder/Expiration) instead of the masked-info + CVV view; switching cards retains the prior card's details or shows two masked cards at once
References: VCST-5009; vc-frontend PR#2328; Skyflow module 3.1003.0; BL-PAY-003, BL-PAY-001; live-verified facts 2026-06-12

Assertions:

Title: Saved Credit Cards Account Page - Remove a DISPOSABLE Card Deletes It From the List
Section: Skyflow > Saved Cards > Account Page > Delete
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
- Logged in as USER_DEFAULT.
- PRECONDITION (canonical-card preservation): the account MUST hold a SURPLUS/disposable saved card IN ADDITION TO the canonical Mastercard ending 0015. NOTE: the Skyflow QA vault authorizes ONLY 5424...0015, so the disposable is ANOTHER masked 0015 record (same visual tail '•••• 0015', different skyflowId), seeded via PAY-SKY-018. You CANNOT distinguish the two cards by their displayed tail — use GetSkyflowCards to capture both skyflowIds and identify which is the surplus record. Canonical-preservation rule = always keep >=1 card with skyflowId == canonical skyflowId alive; delete only a SURPLUS 0015 skyflowId. If the account holds only ONE saved card, re-seed via PAY-SKY-018 first. Live-verified 2026-06-12: each card row on /account/saved-credit-cards has a 'Remove credit card' button; a 'Confirm Delete' modal (Cancel / OK) is presented before deletion. Account-page rows expose no per-card id in the DOM; rows follow GetSkyflowCards array order, and the network (GetSkyflowCards / deleteSkyflowCard) is the authoritative oracle for which card a Remove targeted.
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/saved-credit-cards
[WAIT] Wait for the card list to render (GetSkyflowCards resolves)
[ASSERT] Capture GetSkyflowCards response (network or GraphQL tab): record both skyflowIds and their array positions; note the total card count (must be >=2 — both are '•••• 0015' rows visually, distinguished only by skyflowId)
[ACT] From the captured skyflowIds, pick ANY ONE surplus 0015 skyflowId to delete — with >=2 saved 0015 records all are authorization-equivalent, so you only need to keep >=1 alive. Do NOT infer the survivor from array position (GetSkyflowCards returns newest-first, so the original/canonical card is NOT necessarily index 0); the deleteSkyflowCard request body is the authoritative record of which skyflowId you removed. Click 'Remove credit card' on the chosen surplus card's row
[ACT] A 'Confirm Delete' modal appears — click OK to confirm removal (live-verified: modal is always present; clicking Cancel aborts the deletion)
[WAIT] Wait for the list to refresh (GetSkyflowCards re-issued / list re-rendered)
[ASSERT] Verify via GetSkyflowCards response that the DELETED skyflowId is absent from the updated cards[] array
[ASSERT] The canonical skyflowId REMAINS in the cards[] array — it must not be removed
[ASSERT] The card count decreases by exactly 1
Assertions:
[DOM] One card row removed from the list after Remove + OK confirm
[STATE] Card count decreases by exactly 1; the canonical skyflowId is present in the post-delete GetSkyflowCards response
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] deleteSkyflowCard mutation fires with the SURPLUS skyflowId and returns true with empty errors[]; a follow-up GetSkyflowCards no longer lists the deleted skyflowId but still lists the canonical skyflowId
Failure_Signals: The deleted skyflowId is still present in GetSkyflowCards after Remove (delete no-op); a different/wrong skyflowId is removed (wrong-row targeting); the LAST 0015 skyflowId removed (canonical-preservation failure — STOP and re-seed); deleteSkyflowCard returns false or errors[] non-empty; card count does not drop by exactly 1; raw PAN visible in any network payload
Cleanup: Re-seed the deleted disposable card by re-running PAY-SKY-018 (new-card cart payment with 'Save card' checked) so downstream multi-card cases (PAY-SKY-017/020, CVAL-GQL-012) keep their 2nd card. NEVER delete the last remaining 0015 skyflowId.
References: VCST-5009; vc-frontend PR#2328; Skyflow module 3.1003.0; BL-PAY-003; live-verified per-card 'Remove credit card' control + Confirm Delete modal 2026-06-12; UI counterpart of the API delete CVAL-GQL-012

Title: Saved Credit Cards - Cross-Surface Consistency: Card Deleted on Account Page Disappears From Cart Dropdown; Card Saved at Checkout Appears Here
Section: Skyflow > Saved Cards > Account Page > Cross-Surface
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- Logged in as USER_DEFAULT.
- PRECONDITION: account holds the canonical MC ending 0015 (SKYFLOW_MC) PLUS a SURPLUS/disposable card (seeded via PAY-SKY-018). NOTE: the Skyflow QA vault authorizes only 5424...0015, so the disposable is ANOTHER masked 0015 record (same visual tail '•••• 0015', distinct skyflowId). You CANNOT distinguish the two cards by their displayed tail on either surface — use GetSkyflowCards to capture both skyflowIds and identify which is the surplus record. Canonical-preservation rule = always keep >=1 card with the canonical skyflowId alive; delete only the SURPLUS skyflowId.
- Cart has >=1 item and a Delivery method selected so the Skyflow 'Select credit card' dropdown renders on /cart.
- Skyflow AllowCartPayment=true. Does NOT place an order. Live-verified 2026-06-12: a 'Confirm Delete' modal (Cancel / OK) is shown before deletion. Account-page rows expose no per-card id in the DOM; rows follow GetSkyflowCards array order, and the network (GetSkyflowCards / deleteSkyflowCard) is the authoritative oracle for which card a Remove targeted.
Steps:
--- SURFACE A: Account page (delete a surplus card) ---
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/account/saved-credit-cards
[WAIT] Wait for the card list to render
[ASSERT] Capture GetSkyflowCards response: record both skyflowIds and note total card count (>=2 required — both visually show '•••• 0015'); also capture the GetSkyflowCards set the cart dropdown will show (both surfaces share this query)
[ACT] From the captured skyflowIds, pick ANY ONE surplus 0015 skyflowId to delete (all 0015 records are authorization-equivalent; keep >=1 alive). Do NOT infer the survivor from array position — GetSkyflowCards returns newest-first; the deleteSkyflowCard request body is the authoritative record of which skyflowId you removed. Click 'Remove credit card' on the chosen surplus card's row; click OK on the 'Confirm Delete' modal (live-verified modal behavior)
[WAIT] Wait for the account-page list to refresh
[ASSERT] GetSkyflowCards response no longer contains the DELETED skyflowId; the canonical skyflowId is still present; card count drops by exactly 1
--- SURFACE B: Cart payment dropdown (consistency) ---
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; select a Delivery method (e.g. Fixed Rate Ground); select 'Bank card (Skyflow)' if not pre-selected
[WAIT] Wait for the 'Select credit card' dropdown to render
[ACT] Open the 'Select credit card' dropdown
[ASSERT] Capture the GetSkyflowCards response for the cart surface: the DELETED skyflowId is ABSENT; the canonical skyflowId is present; card count matches the post-delete account-page count (both surfaces agree)
Assertions:
[STATE] A card removed on /account/saved-credit-cards no longer appears in the cart 'Select credit card' dropdown — the deleted skyflowId is absent from both surfaces' GetSkyflowCards responses
[STATE] The canonical skyflowId is present in both the account-page list and the cart dropdown after the delete
[MATH] Card count drops by exactly 1 on each surface (account page and cart dropdown agree on the surviving set)
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] skyflowCards(storeId:"{{STORE_ID}}") on both surfaces returns the same surviving set; the deleted skyflowId is absent from both; the canonical skyflowId is present in both
Failure_Signals: The deleted skyflowId is still present in the cart dropdown GetSkyflowCards response after account-page removal (surfaces out of sync — the bug this case guards); the canonical skyflowId is accidentally removed (canonical-preservation failure — STOP and re-seed); card count differs between account page and cart dropdown (cache divergence); a wrong/different skyflowId was removed on the account page
Cleanup: Re-seed the deleted surplus card via PAY-SKY-018 so multi-card cases keep their 2nd card. No order placed.
References: VCST-5009; vc-frontend PR#2328; Skyflow module 3.1003.0; BL-PAY-003; UI cross-surface counterpart of the API delete CVAL-GQL-012; live-verified shared GetSkyflowCards source feeds both surfaces + Confirm Delete modal 2026-06-12

Title: Saved Credit Cards Account Page - Empty State When No Saved Cards (CONDITIONAL — verify behavior, do not delete the canonical card)
Section: Skyflow > Saved Cards > Account Page > Empty State
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]

DO NOT empty the account by deleting the canonical MC to force this state.
- To run deterministically, use a SEPARATE disposable account that has NO saved Skyflow cards (a freshly registered storefront user with no checkout history). If no card-free account is available, mark this case N/A with a note rather than emptying USER_DEFAULT.

[ASSERT] No card rows are rendered; no error toast; no broken/loading state persists
[ASSERT] No 'Add card' control is present on this page (adding cards is checkout-only — confirmed absent during discovery)
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Saved credit cards' heading present with an empty-state message/illustration and zero card rows
[STATE] Page resolves cleanly to the empty state (no error, no infinite spinner)
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] GetSkyflowCards returns cards: [] (empty array) with empty errors[] on a card-free account
Failure_Signals: Page errors / shows an infinite spinner / breaks when the account has no saved cards; a phantom card row renders for an empty set; GetSkyflowCards errors[] non-empty on an empty account

References: VCST-5009; vc-frontend PR#2328; Skyflow module 3.1003.0; BL-PAY-003; empty state NOT observable during discovery 2026-06-12 (account held a card; canonical-card preservation forbids emptying) — run on a card-free account or mark N/A
